entry.title: Re: S_ALR_87012993 drill down to KOB1
entry.content: Thanks Gavin, the variant layout is the default 1SAP and there are no filters. I suppose I'll ask to mother-house ...

entry.title: Re: Invoicing in SAP Ariba
entry.content:
May 2024 Release Features

With 2405 Release of SAP Ariba (effective since Fri, 17th May 2024), we now have following interesting features available for Invoicing.

NG-6369: Enhancement for Japanese Invoices to Display Tax Rate of Line Items: With the introduction of TEKIKAKU SEIKYUSHO TOU HOZON HOUSHIKI invoicing method in Japan, SAP Ariba Buying and Invoicing displays the calculated tax summarization at the header level during invoice creation. You can now display the tax rates of line items on SAP Ariba Buying and Invoicing for Japanese invoices. This is possible by creating custom fields that can capture the tax rates of the line items and additional line-item information, if available. Details here.

NG-6303: Peppol Integration for Singapore: SAP Business Network now extends Peppol integration for Singapore to exchange invoices between suppliers and buyers. Both the supplier and buyer must be registered users of Peppol. Details here.

NP-36965: Support for Marking an Invoice Attachment as the Original Invoice: The Create Invoice page now supports assigning one header attachment as the original invoice. This makes it easier to identify the original invoice. Buyer need to enable the 'Allow suppliers to assign one of the attachments as the original invoice' rule under the 'Allow suppliers to send invoice attachments' rule. Details here.

NP-39498: Allow Suppliers to Subscribe to Receive a Notification when an Order is Ready to Invoice: Suppliers can now subscribe to receive a notification when an order is ready to invoice. Previously, suppliers had to login to SAP Business Network to access the Orders to Invoice tile in the supplier workbench to determine if an order is ready to invoice. Details here.

AINV-1000: Copy Non-PO Invoices in Guided Buying: This helps providing operational ease while creating similar Invoice. To enable the feature, GB Parameter PARAM_ENABLE_COPY_NON_PO_INVOICE (Default value - false) needs to be set to 'true'. Line items, tax, split accounting, invoice header fields, and custom fields are copied to new Invoice. Comments, attachments, and the approval flow are not copied. Invoices created using a Form can't be copied. By default, when you copy an Invoice, the invoice number is also copied & needs to be changed manually. If you want a new invoice number to automatically generate on the new invoice, you need to configure self-service Parameter Application.GuidedBuy.AutoGenerateInvoiceNumberForCopyInvoice. Details here.

Intelligent Invoice Conversion (IIC) now supports India specific Tax Authority mandated fields & an Inbound Email Channel to receive PDF & Scanned Invoices: Details here.

entry.title: SAP Analytics cloud: table filters disappear when removing/moving a page
entry.content:
Hi!

 We have a story with some pages.
On the first page there is a table with some dimension in rows, some measures in columns and some filters.
We notice that if we try to remove or move the second page, the table on the other page loses all the filters.
In the page that we want to remove/move there are not objects linked to the table on the other page.
The same happens when removing/moving a blank page.
We use stories in optimized mode with canvas pages.
We encountered the same problem both on existing stories and on new stories.
Can you please help us?
Thanks

#sac #table #table

entry.title: Re: Sales order in progress should be close
entry.content:
Hello @marnic 

I would suggest not to change the sales order quantity as you are going to lose the information what has been originally ordered.

Rather put a reason for rejection for the item that you are not able to deliver. That will close the item and will store the information why the item has not been delivered fully.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: How to add object S_ARCD_RES to user id?
entry.content:
I am new to SAP. I am trying to archive the PO document and load using SARI. The PO document has been archived and stored on the content server successfully, but when I am trying to load the PO document using SARI, it is complaining:  "Handle 0 is not known." Message no. BA021.I tried to check in the SAP notes and found the cause and resolution for the issue: 

Cause
The user is missing the required authorization.

Resolution
Ensure that the user has the authorization for object S_ARCD_RES (with activity 02).

I need help to know how to add the object S_ARCD_RES to the user ID. 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Identity Access Management (IAM) Reference Architectures 2024
entry.content:
I fully agree with separating Business tiers and IAM tiers. Using your example of a developer who has access to Dev, Test, Prod systems with varying roles and authorisations in each of these systems (e.g. that employee does development work on Dev, does some testing on Test, and as a normal employee in Production). This business user's identity should be managed as a single entity for the whole lifecycle, meaning, when the user gets hired in the HR system this user's access then gets provisioned in Dev, Test, Prod and assigned with appropriate technical roles and then revoked when that same user leaves the organisation. The effect to the architecture will be something like this?

 

and for various tiers / system landscape to support the application lifecycle

 

For each of these tiers, ideally there should be a 1:1 Cloud Identity Services tenant to Cloud Services. In this past only 2 tenants are given - one prod and one non-prod. This has changed now and additional tenants can be requested to support each of the Cloud Services tier

entry.title: Re: Fiori ALP: Visual filter not visible
entry.content:
If you're using OData V4, you need to specify Aggregation.ApplySupported and several other annotations to display visual filters (or charts). For more details, refer to the "Enabling Aggregation in the Back End" section in the UI5 documentation.

Additionally, the following blog post explains how to show an Analytical List Page (ALP) with a CAP OData V4 backend. Although it doesn't cover XML annotations, it should give you a good idea:

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/building-an-analytical-list-page-with-cap-odata-v4/ba-p/13556720

entry.title: Hybris 2211 : SmartEdit date picker prefilled with the current date when it should be empty
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

On editing the component from smartedit, notice that if empty date field is present its value gets prepopulated with the current date.

I understand that allowing an empty date/time field in OOTB logic is as below: 

  • If there is date/time value exist in backend, then its displayed
  • If it is EMPTY, then SmartEdit Date/Time picker add start time of current date by default as input of this date/time field.

Is there any way besides smartedit customization, that we could still continue to show empty field instead of default date/time?

Any suggestions on how this can be done?

Thanks

Thanks 

Faim Ahmed

entry.title: Re: Live access to SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud and SAP BW in SAP Analytics Cloud, add-in for Microsoft
entry.content:
Hello Steffen,

we set up a tunnel connection meanwhile on our test SAC tenant. We noticed that only users who have BI Admin role see the BW queries when they select the BW connection after login to SAC tenant with the SAC add-in. Content creators who have read access to all connections and full authorization on analytical models and on Add-in Workbook do not see the queries. Which SAC authorization objects have to be selected to see the queries?

Regards

Sabine

entry.title: SSAM 2405 App update causses issue
entry.content:
Hi All,

As per customer requirement we have enabled the SSAM 2310 version and Users were using the 2310 version over Google play store downloaded app in android device.

Now last week SAP has updated the app over google play store and new version is not allowing the 2310 version to run.

Is there any way we could use the SSAM2310 on latest SSAM client in android device?

entry.title: Re: Cold Storage enablement for SAP BW bridge in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Thanks @kurzdo  for sharing this information. 

I have looking into how to convert a SAP BW 7.5 on HANA system (which also utilizes a SAP IQ database for Near Line storage, to SAP Datasphere with a BW Bridge activated. DAP jobs have been setup on ADSOs in this system

I have read SAP Note 2469514, which tells me that there is no migration tool to transfer the DAP jobs to BW Bridge. What is not clear is whether in case of ADSOs (in the source SAP BW on HANA), we need to reload data from the archives to HOT Store and then transfer the data from the source SAP BW on HANA to the Datasphere tenant. This would imply we need to before.hand, scale up the HANA memory capacity in the source SAP BW to accommodate the data reloaded from the archives.

I wanted to ask if my understand is correct and if there is any other way to transfer the archived data from SAP IQ directly to the BW Bridge(WARM) or the embedded HANA Cloud Data Lake relational engine(COLD) associated with the Datasphere tenant?

entry.title: Earmarked Funds with Workflow
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

¿Could you help me with one issue?

We activated a WF for one Earmarked Funds Document type that have been used in productive system for some time. The WF works well for the new created documents and their value adjustments.

But the value adjustmens for the documents that was created before this change still posted directly, without launching the WF. 

We are thinking in put manually the flag in the field KBLK-WF_START for the documents created without WF configuration. Is there any objection? 

O may be someone knows any way to fix it without modify the standard table? 

Thank you in advance

Best wishes

entry.title: Re: AI in SAP Ariba Invoicing - Intelligent Invoice Conversion
entry.content:
May 2024 Release Features

With 2405 Release of SAP Ariba (effective since Fri, 17th May 2024), we now have 2 interesting features available for Intelligent Invoice Conversion (IIC).
IIC now supports India specific Tax Authority mandated fields & an Inbound Email Channel to receive PDF & Scanned Invoices.

Intelligent Invoice Conversion Support for India Specific Invoice PDF Processing (NP-38087)

Intelligent Invoice Conversion (IIC) has now been enhanced to support India specific Tax authority mandated fields. A framework has now been added in the IIC solution to also extract Country specific fields from the PDF or scanned paper invoices belonging to a Supplier on the SAP Business Network. Indian suppliers can now send the data in the PDF Invoices cleared by the Indian Tax Portal, to their buyers on the SAP Business Network through a simple upload or sending their PDF or scanned paper Invoices via Email.
Kindly refer these links for details.

  • 2405 Readiness Feature Preview: Intelligent Invoice Conversion Support for India Specific Invoice PDF Processing (NP-38087)
  • NP-38087: Intelligent Invoice Conversion Support for India Specific Invoice PDF Processing

Intelligent Invoice Conversion Support for Inbound Email Channel to Receive PDF and Scanned Invoices (NP-38357)

The Intelligent Invoice Conversion solution now supports uploading PDF or scanned paper Invoices via Email. With this feature, suppliers can attach their PDF or scanned paper Invoices to an Email & send it to SAP Business Network. Network then extracts the invoice files & converts them using Invoice conversion templates. Kindly refer these links for details.

  • 2405 Readiness Feature Preview: Intelligent Invoice Conversion Support for Inbound Email Channel to Receive PDF and Scanned Invoices (NP-38357)
  • NP-38357: Intelligent Invoice Conversion Support for Inbound Email Channel to Receive PDF and Scanned Invoices

For general SAP Ariba Invoicing related feature updates, refer this.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4 HANA Data Migration Cockpit Clarification
entry.content:
Hello, 

Have a look a the below Blog. Though it is for Material Master, it does talk about Extended (Custom) Fields: 

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/how-to-add-custom-fields-to-sap-s-4hana-data-migration-cockpit-with-data/ba-p/13478662

Thanks,

entry.title: SAP Open Source Webinar: How to fight the dependency hell
entry.content:
*Open Source Project “Renovate” for automating dependency updates*

While using more and more open source software in their products, SAP and other enterprises need to ensure that they are running the correct versions with the latest bug-fixes and features for their services. With the massive volume of repositories and their dependencies, this becomes a tedious task. Over the past years, many teams at SAP have automated dependency management with the open source tool Renovate. In 2023, we have seen over 220.000 update pull requests being created internally.

Join us on June 25th at 3:00 pm CEST/ 1:00 pm UTC/ 9:00 am EST for a webinar with Tobias Gabriel, Senior Developer in the SAP Open Source Program Office. Tobias will show and demonstrate the use of Renovate for dependency updates, his motivation to contributing to this tool, and talk about SAP’s cultural shift towards automation with dependency management. It would be great to use this webinar to also discuss your experiences with dependency automation.

Location: Teams Meeting

Speaker: Tobias Gabriel (tobias.gabriel@sap.com), Senior Developer in the SAP Open Source Program Office

Host: SAP Open Source Program Office

Registration Link: https://events.sap.com/how-to-fight-dependency-hell/en/registration.aspx

entry.title: Re: Unloading data from a SAP Build Apps VCF backend to CSV files
entry.content: The output you're using is the right one. I suggest to add a text box to your app in order to display the output of the JS. This should help you troubleshooting your app.

entry.title: Re: SAC date picker for the last 90 days
entry.content: Thank you for your quick response. I had already looked at this custom widget, but it doesn't quite meet our requirements. For now, we have solved it with a fixed filter set for the entire year. It's a bit surprising that this option isn't available in SAC. Best regards

entry.title: Re: Unable to connect to HANA Cloud instance throwing Con...
entry.content:
Did you allow connections to your SAP HANA Cloud database instance from IPs outside of your BTP region?

See 
https://help.sap.com/docs/hana-cloud/sap-hana-cloud-administration-guide/sap-hana-database-connections
https://help.sap.com/docs/hana-cloud/sap-hana-cloud-administration-guide/change-allowed-connections-using-cli
https://help.sap.com/docs/hana-cloud/sap-hana-cloud-administration-guide/sap-hana-database-configuration 
"Socket closed by peer" is the typical error message you would get if you tried to connect from an IP that is not on the allowlist.

entry.title: Re: Back to basics with SAP Cloud Application Programming Model (CAP) - part 14
entry.content:
Links to resources relevant for and mentioned in this episode:

  • Examples of `after` methods in use:
    • with 'UPDATE' events (note also the use of `(_, req)`) https://github.com/SAP-samples/cap-sflight/blob/ffcd685afe4c0c5354fd895bd3d42c4c26916f43/srv/travel-service.js
    • with 'each', plus with an action reference (`this.after('submitOrder', async (_, req) => { ... })`) https://github.com/SAP-samples/cloud-cap-samples/blob/ac6d87dc03a63eb38a63cc9110327fd5d9dda798/bookshop/srv/cat-service.js 
    • Blog post "Defining a custom 'after' handler in CAP with 'each'" https://qmacro.org/blog/posts/2024/05/09/defining-a-custom-'after'-handler-in-cap-with-'each'/ 
    • with multiple events (and emitting events in turn) https://github.com/SAP-samples/cloud-cap-samples/blob/ac6d87dc03a63eb38a63cc9110327fd5d9dda798/reviews/srv/reviews-service.js 
    • with the classic 'data' first parameter and a reference to a handler function https://github.com/SAP-samples/cap-sample-incidents-mgmt/blob/faa616cf3bc9eb7ca8b54ea8d928968a2910b0c6/srv/processors-service.js 
  • (Capire) Method srv.after (request) https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/node.js/core-services#srv-after-request 
  • New(ish) YouTube Shorts"Good To Know" series on CAP Node.js https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6RpkC85SLQDZ18v94otZSJJrpcNkPPV9 
  • (Capire) Core Services - How to provide custom service implementations? (incl. the two styles) https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/node.js/core-services#how-to-provide-custom-service-implementations

entry.title: Re: Copy Recipient from MB1A / MIGO to EWM Delivery
entry.content:
Hi Tim,

Kind regards,

Chris

entry.title: Enhance the security of your supplier account with Multi-Factor Authentication
entry.content:
It is no surprise that a supplier account on SAP Business Network holds sensitive business information. Therefore, it is important to keep access to your account as secure as possible, just like you do with any cloud-based application you use in your daily life. Here are two top tips to help you enhance the security of your supplier account

1. Don’t share access credentials

Keeping only one set of credentials with admin rights and sharing them with anyone who needs access is surprisingly still very common practice, especially in smaller organizations. While it is of course an easy and hassle-free method, is is also a highly unsecured one. Even in teams made of a limited amount of trustworthy colleagues, openly sharing access information exposes to high risks of anyone accessing your account and gaining or messing with valuable data.

The better practice is for the administrator of the account to create users, so that each individual who needs access gets their own credentials. You can then also decide the level of visibility and range of action that each user gets, based on their job responsibility and the way they should be using SAP Business Network. Don’t forget to also remove the access of anyone who has left your company.

In a nutshell, keep your account tidy and ensure the structure of users mirrors the structure of your organization. If you need any guidance on how to setup users and roles, watch this short tutorial video.

2. Activate the Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA)

The multi-factor authentication is a two-step verification process where users are required to authenticate themselves a second time using a time-based verification code. In comparison with the single step authentication process, the multi-factor authentication process provides enhanced security.

Account administrators can now enable the following functionalities for users in their organization by selecting the desired users from a table:

  • Require multi-factor authentication for critical fields
  • Require multi-factor authentication for login

Once the multi-factor authentication is enabled for your organization, you must install an authenticator application on your handheld device to generate a time-based verification code. Examples of compatible apps are SAP Authenticator, Google Authenticator or Microsoft Authenticator, all available for iOS and Android devices.

For detailed instructions on how to enable multi-factor authentication on your SAP Business Network account, please refer to this helpful guide.

 

With these few practices in place, you are certain to keep transacting with your customers with renewed efficiency and peace of mind.

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
Hi SAP community!

I am Manuel from Germany. 

The main reason I'm here is to learn and discuss with you about SAP eDocument solutions, certificates, ABAP and other FI topics from SAP!

Very happy to join the community.

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA - Empowering Your Homepage: Enabling My Home for SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS0
entry.content:
Are Insights supported in On-Premise?

We found that the official documentation for On-Premise mentions the Insights. But it does not seem to work. We can add a card to insights from Fiori Elements applications, but they are not available in the new MyHome.

In the SPRO transaction, we have the following description for the setting UI5_INSIGHTS:

"Enables the Insights support in ABAP Platform in cloud systems. Please don't set this property true in on-premise systems."

entry.title: Re: Guidance to select a certification - Supply Chain Management
entry.content:
Hi @Abu07 ,

Welcome aboard and thanks for the question. The first step would be to check out your local job postings - what sort of skills are being sought in your job market?

Here is one possible route you can take:

1. Discovering SAP Business Network Supply Chain Collaboration Features and Functions

2. Configuring SAP Business Network Supply Chain Collaboration

Exam: SAP Certified Associate - SAP Business Network Supply Chain Collaboration

If you would rather pursue analytics, try this blog.

I hope this helps!

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to print smartform directly to printer...
entry.content:
Have you been that unlucky in your search, you have to prevent any pop-up to ask for print parameters and fill those yourself with those parameters:

control parameter, set

  • no_dialog = abap_true.
  • device = 'PRINTER'.

output option, set

  • tddest = <name of printer>.
  • tdimmed = abap_true.

entry.title: Re: S4 SOAP call: CX_PROXY_ST_INVALID_DATA:XSLT exception.
entry.content:
I had the same Issue. Check if some WSDL Type definitions relevant for your input structure use choice-Tags. The SAP Proxy generates special "Choice-Structures" with an obligatory field named "SELECTION" where you need to identify the choice.  Otherwise the transformation throws an CX_PROXY_ST_INVALID_DATA exception. 

Example: 

DATA ls_choice TYPE Z_GENERATED_EXAMPLE_CHOICE_STRUCTURE. 

ls_choice-selection= 'EXAMPLE_CHOICE_A'. " Generated Standard field

ls_choice-example_choice_a = 'Some value'. " choice to be filled

" ls_choice-example_choice_b must not be filled

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to print smartform directly to printer...
entry.content: You have to prevent any pop-up to ask for print parameters

entry.content:
Hi @julia_stumpe ,

Thanks for the history lesson. Here's to another 25 years! 🥂

For those wondering which universities are members, click here.

entry.title: Value Analysis and potential monetary impact in SAP Signavio Process Insights, discovery edition
entry.content:
Dear Community,

Welcome to our blog 3 from our eight-part blog journey. In this blog we will provide you with a comprehensive understanding on Value Analysis based on the next section of the SAP Signavio Process Insights, discovery edition.

Please note that this blog is an updated version of the blog (Estimate the benefits of your process performance ... - SAP Community) which was previously shared.

*Access previous blogs:

  • Outline: Introducing Blog Series of SAP Signavio Process In... - SAP Community
  • Start page and four main pillars: Start page of SAP Signavio Process Insights, disco... - SAP Community
  • Blog 1: End-to-End processes: End-to-end Processes and modular processes in SAP ... - SAP Community
    • Deep Dive: End-to-End processes: Source to Pay: Deep dive: End-to-End processes with a closer look... - SAP Community
  • Blog 2: Lines of Business: Lines of Business (LoBs) and Value Drivers in SAP ... - SAP Community

 

What is Value Analysis?

See how much your company can gain by optimizing your processes:

  • See the potential value of achieving specified process improvement targets for certain standard performance indicator types. Performance indicators are grouped by value driver and in order of value.
  • Understand how the potential value is calculated based on a specified improvement target and a predefined formula that uses metrics that come directly from the process performance data collected from your source system.
  • Influence the value calculation by changing and saving the improvement target, as well as some input values used in the formula.
  • Monitor your progress towards achieving the potential value for each performance indicator.


See how this is applied with a concrete example:

In this new “Value Analysis” section, you will start by uncovering concrete value drivers, such as reducing finance cost. You can pick one and drill down to individual indicators of performance impacting this value driver and see the monetary benefits of improving the related performance. The tool shows you the calculations and inputs, including SAP assumptions you can modify according to your needs or specific situation.

This capability provides easy and automated value case creation for SAP Signavio. We hope it will assist you in your value-driven discussions & decision making.

Let me show you how it works!

In the example above, let’s click on “Reduce Sales Costs”:

And then on arrow on the right for the related indicator "Sales documents created":

A new page appears:

The top part of this new panel are the "Baseline State" and "Target State":


On the left, for the Baseline State, we see the current automation rate is 7,93%, we can also see when the data for the automation rate was collected and more importantly, the monetary impact. We will come back to it at the end of this blog.

On the right is the Target State, we see the improvement percentage and the target as well as its monetary impact value.

Please note: "Target State" is by default the goal of being among the best 25% performing companies for the related performance. It is possible to change this target state and the assumptions.

The bottom left is the "Input Values and Assumptions" section.


The input values come from your system -such as the "number of sales documents created in a week"-.
The assumptions are generic, like for example “Average time required to create a sales document manually” (minutes).

On the last section on the bottom right, you will see the formula to calculate the potential benefits:


It is in essence the multiplication of the inputs and assumptions on the top.
Finally, the Potential Value:

The "Baseline Monetary Impact" is the maximum potential benefit (here the benefits of going from the current 7.93% automation rate to 100% automation rate). The goal is to achieve the baseline monetary impact through process improvements that lower costs, here reducing costly manual effort through increasing automation.

The "Target Monetary Impact" is the benefit of going from the targeted 76.97% automation rate to 100% automation rate.

The difference between the baseline monetary impact and the target monetary impact is the "Potential Value". Or if you prefer the estimated benefits of going from an automation rate of 7.93% to 76.97%. This is this figure we focus on.

Let's see in detail:

Baseline Monetary Impact = 3,000 outbound deliveries created in a week x 48 weeks worked per year x 1-7.93% Sales documents automatically created x 10min x 25EUR = 552.4K EUR / Year

Target Monetary Impact = 111 x 48 1-76.97% x 10min x 25EUR= 138.2K EUR / Year

Potential Value = current potential benefits - target potential benefits = 552.4K Eur – 138.2K = 414.2K Eur

Please note: The progression tab is only available on SAP Signavio Process Insights full edition as SAP Signavio Process Insights, discovery edition is a one-time report.

This capability -part of SAP Signavio Process Insights, discovery edition- is an easy first step to build your case for process transformation. Some assumptions are made by SAP, but you can change them if you feel your specific situation does not qualify for the standard inputs.

In the next blog of our eight-part blog journey, we will explore the Process Flows.

You can request SAP Signavio Process Insights, discovery edition for your productive SAP ERP or SAP S/4HANA system on https://url.sap/discovery-edition.

Key takeaways

  1. Value Analysis in SAP Signavio Process Insights, discovery edition: Access detailed information on value analysis for various performance indicators. Users can identify specific value drivers and explore individual performance indicators to understand the monetary benefits of improving performance.
  2. Value Case Creation: The capability enables you to make value-driven decisions based on concrete data and insights.
  3. Focus on Process Transformation: The capability provided by the discovery edition is presented as an initial step towards building a case for process transformation, empowering users to leverage data-driven insights to drive meaningful changes in their processes.

Overall, the blog aims to provide readers with a comprehensive understanding of value analysis within SAP Signavio Process Insights, emphasizing its accessibility, functionality, and potential to drive process transformation initiatives.

*SAP Signavio Process Insights, discovery edition in General Availability. Request your free analysis today! (*For all SAP maintenance customers)

entry.title: REGEX - How to Replace special case

Now I have the problem, that in the amount the decimal sign is also ,

Is there a way to replace the , (seperator) to ; with REGEX?

Sigi

entry.title: Re: /SCWM/PI_CC_CREATE result to be one Physical Inventor...
entry.content:
Hi,

well, SAP Support is not a consulting department.

The question is, what have you tried already? And where are you stuck?

Brgds

Juergen

---
All the above is no official SAP statement.

Want to learn EWM?
Check for EWM courses: https://training.sap.com/trainingpath/Applications-Extended+Warehouse+Management-EWM+in+S4HANA
Get a SAP Learning Hub Subscription: https://training.sap.com/learninghub

And it is EWM. NOT eWM - Duh!
And if your question includes the word "transfer order" - do NOT tag the question with Extended Warehouse Management!

entry.title: Re: Message no. M7328 deficit of delivery quantity when d...
entry.content:
found the issue:

vendor confirmation is being done per EDI with an external tool and when the confirmation is changed, the sequential number (EKBE-ETES) changes.

so when the GR for 103 is done, it creates a record in EKBE with seq number of the existing confirmation and if the confirmation is being changed after that, the seq number is being overwritten and when MIGO 105 is being performed, it does not find the original record in EKBE anymore

entry.title: Re: validation to FV60 header text BKTXT
entry.content: Did ou get some problem with transaction GGB0, where are you stuck?

entry.title: CDS View for Business Partner Address ID
entry.content:
Is there a CDS view which can be used to retrieve the Business Partner Address ID in S/4HANA Cloud?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP Datasphere News in May
entry.content:
A few days before SAPPHIRE we close another awesome month packed with great 🚀 new features in SAP Datasphere. There are also lots of excellent new blogs in the community in May.

 

My top features in May

Multi-lingual metadata support

The multi-language support was just extended with the introduction of the translation dashboard where you are now able to also translate the object metadata, specifically for analytics with SAP Analytics Cloud. You can now access the dashboard and translate metadata such as business names and column names for dimensions and analytic models, and also hierarchy dimension labels for stories to different languages. You can translate manually or via an XLIFF file, but also manage already existing translations, and update them. For more information check out the online documentation and the blog SAP Datasphere Multilingual Support - Translation Dashboard.

Efficiency Features

We have added features in various areas of the product helping to use the product way more efficiently.

  1. In the analytic model you can now copy existing measures to create a new measure. Very helpful if you are creating a bunch of similar measures. In addition, for measures, attributes and associated dimensions there is now a Select All/Unselect All checkbox which is very helpful. More information.
  2. Data access controls are now listed in the Data Builder application and in addition to the relocation, you can now import and export data access controls in CSN/JSON files. More information.
  3. If email notification is set up for a task chain, you will now receive email notifications if an error occurs during initialization or preparation phase to run the task chain, before the task chain run actually starts. More information.
  4. In the data marketplace you can now duplicate existing data products which helps especially if you create lots of similar data products. More information.

 

 

My top blogs in May

Multi-language is not new to SAP Datasphere. The details of the new and existing features are described by @mona_durai in the
➡️ SAP Datasphere Multilingual Support - Master Data Translation and by @senthurshree in the blog
➡️ SAP Datasphere Multilingual Support - Translation Dashboard.

@GaetanSaulnier highlights the new catalog source to be able to harvest metadata from the SAP BW bridge in his great blog
➡️ SAP Datasphere catalog - Harvesting from SAP Datasphere, SAP BW bridge.

Now that Confluent Kafka is available as a target in transformation flows @DanielKraemer gets you all the details in his blog
➡️ Replication Flow Blog Part 6 – Confluent as Replication Target.

@Sefan_Linders blogs about how you can partition a transformation flow in SAP Datasphere by using the CLI
➡️ Transformation Flow partition generation with SAP Datasphere CLI.

 

More blogs to check out

  • Where can I start learning to relate SAP BW bridge to SAP Datasphere?
  • ディメンション(ビジネスエンティティ)に階層ビューを外部階層として割り当ててテキストを表示する方法
  • Integration Between SAP Datasphere and SAP Analytics Cloud - Blog 1
  • Integration Between SAP Datasphere and SAP Analytics Cloud - Blog 2
  • Integration Between SAP Datasphere and SAP Analytics Cloud - Blog 3
  • Integration Between SAP Datasphere and SAP Analytics Cloud - Blog 4
  • Extracting Data from S4HANA ODP to SAP Datasphere
  • The Power Duo: SAP HANA Cloud and SAP Datasphere Enabling IDA & Gen-AI Driven Solutions
  • Data Access Control in SAP Datasphere - Operator and values DAC
  • SAP Datasphere – “The Next Big Step in Unified Analytics “
  • SAP Datasphere Multilingual Support - Master Data Translation
  • SAP Datasphere Multilingual Support - Translation Dashboard
  • Transformation Flow partition generation with SAP Datasphere CLI
  • SAP Datasphere – Security Concept
  • SAP Datasphere – SAP HANA Database Monitoring
  • SAP BW Bridge – Integrating with On-Premises ECC / BW servers
  • SAP BW bridge – SAP Cloud connector configuration
  • SAP Datasphere - Space Management
  • S/4HANA Public Cloud Integration with SAP Datasphere
  • Watch the SAP BW Modernization Webinar Series
  • Technovation Summit 2024: Expand your AI and BTP Horizons
  • Datasphere – Delta Extraction
  • SAP Datasphere catalog - Harvesting from SAP Datasphere, SAP BW bridge
  • Tracking HANA Machine Learning experiments with MLflow: A conceptual guide for MLOps
  • Tracking HANA Machine Learning experiments with MLflow: A technical Deep Dive
  • Replication Flow Blog Part 6 – Confluent as Replication Target
  • Currency Translation in SAP Datasphere
  • Create SAP S/4HANA External GL Account Hierarchy within SAP Datasphere using standard CDS Views
  • Understanding Data Modeling Tools in SAP

Find more information and related blog posts on the topic page for SAP Datasphere. You will find further product information on our Community with various subpages about Getting Started, Business Content, the SAP BW Bridge as well as content for Best Practices & Troubleshooting and the FAQ for SAP Datasphere.

Find out how to unleash the power of your business data with SAP’s free learning content on SAP Datasphere. It’s designed to help you enrich your data projects, simplify the data landscape, and make the most out of your investment. Check out even more role-based learning resources and opportunities to get certified in one place on  SAP Learning site.

entry.title: Re: CDS View for Business Partner Address ID

The I_ADDRESS_2 CDS view can be used, see also

  • SAP Help Portal for I_ADDRESS_2
  • KBA 3387665 - CDS View I_ADDRESS_2 Does Not Display the Data of the Business Partner

entry.title: SAP Build - Desktop Agent - Unattended bot - logs
entry.content:
Hello,

We have an unattended bot on virtual machine and after a few months of productive usage we are facing a problem that Desktop agent is saving a huge amount of logs which leads to a no free space on a disk.

Those logs are not removed after the restart of the machine even that their type is TMP.

Is there some setting that can be done to not save them or delete them after some time? There are files older than 2 months. Please see attached picture.

Thank you very much.

Patrik

entry.title: Block Planning Implementation in PPDS
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

 

after implementing PP/DS I am facing issues when trying to activate/set up the block planning for a business scenario with variant configuration. Master Data was installed in S4HANA and the 300Class for the variant configuration. After transferring all data through program "Z_ASSIGN_SAPAPO_CLASS" and CFM1 & CFM2 i am able to find the CDP class when trying to create the Blocks in SAPAPO/RES1 - but i get the error message "Enter a valid class".

 

 

does somebody have experience with this issue? Can somebody support?

 

Best Regards

Emir

The main problem is that odata services stop working and then start working again, but I want to fix this.
Could someone help me to do it because I don't want to make a mistake, thanks!

Regards,
Dilip Voora

entry.title: Re: REGEX - How to Replace special case
entry.content:
So you'd like to replace all occurrences of a character (,) unless it's enclosed in quotation marks ("), which won't be easy and code won't be very readable.

Couldn't you ask the file sender to stick to a more stict CSV format?

entry.title: Pricing in Service Order
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are implementing Services Public cloud 2402 Version.

I am facing some issue in my Service Order,how do i get the pricing in to my Service Order and also i want to know what are the steps to proceed and the configuration part.

I observed there are so many item categories there, so what are the Item categories using the stock item, non stock , external services, Expenses items and condition types also.

If the stock item system will generate the Reservation, so this where do we configure? and also non stock item configuration? 

Please guide me on this particular area.

Regards,

Narasimharao

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to print smartform directly to printer in background Job ?
entry.content: There is no difficulty printing forms in background. It's a very frequent requirement. I don't get what your problem is.

entry.title: how to procure multiple assets in SAP for PO created in Ariba with statistical Internal order.
entry.content:
Hi All,
So we have a current process as :-

1. PO is created in Ariba with 1 line item , and Account assignment as I(i.e Statistical Internal Order- to track budget). 
2. This is interfaced to SAP. 
3. Expectation is how can we create multiple asset and post GR/IR to these assets (Distribute amount on IO with total qty) in SAP/ if can be done in Ariba. 
Accounting entry at time of GR:-
Asset 1 Dr.
Asset 2 Dr.
GR/IR Cr.

entry.title: SF-LMS: Information of the security domain an employee belongs to when he completes a course?
entry.content:
We have the following case in our company:

For reporting purposes we want to know the security domain of an employee, the time he completes an item/class. In our implementation each security domain corresponds to an organization unit of our company.

Since there are no historically data in SF-LMS regarding Employment Information or Access Settings for the employees, is there a way to have this information the moment he completes a course?

Thank you!!

why is that and how to solve this problem?

entry.title: BTP Trial-Intgration suite deleted today
entry.content:
Hi,

I am using a BTP Trial and Integration instance used for the intration course.

Tenantid: 7fc9d51d-1df1-43ec-a6b4-8507a2ec1042

Subaccountid: 7fc9d51d-1df1-43ec-a6b4-8507a2ec1042

Provider: AWS

After almost finishing the course Tasks today, the integration instance seems to be deleted.

As I currently use it a lot, it was automatically extended. Creating a new instance for the integation suite was  not possible.

Can this plaese be solved? Also we noticed the same for Pay as you Go instances.

Thanks and best regards,

Xander van Sitteren

entry.title: Fornecedor com mais de uma conta bancária, substituição com base na forma de pagamento
entry.content:
Olá pessoal, alguém consegue me ajudar?

Temos alguns fornecedores, que possuem mais de uma conta para pagamentos cadastrada. Existe alguma forma de parametrizar a escolha da conta de forma automática, com base na forma de pagamento? Ou somente via regra de substituição? Entendo que a regra de substituição atenderia apenas para documentos criados em FI. Portanto, todos os outros vindos do MM, não se aplicam a regra. Se alguém tiver alguma solução, agradeço!

entry.title: Messages in SAC Handling with BW Live Connection
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

  I am working with stories in SAC with a live connection to BW/BPC. There are certain parameterized messages in BW that appear when I execute them in SAC. However, in SAC, the red messages stay while the others disappear. In my case, the validation messages are yellow warnings that disappear from the SAC screen after 10 seconds. I would like to know if it is possible to retrieve these messages and save or expose them in some way so that the user can review them without them disappearing. I cannot find any functionality or property to retrieve these messages from the system. Is there any container or functionality I can use to handle the messages?

Thanks in advance,

entry.title: Re: Copy inspection results from SFG to FG in Public cloud
entry.content: It worked! thanks enda.

entry.title: Re: How to create a BRF+ rule to check date?
entry.content: Thanks. It's working very good! 😄

entry.title: Memory Limits app is missing in the DVM tool in SAP for ME
entry.content:
Hello, 

As part of our operations, we use the DVM tool located on the SAP for ME and detected the memory app limits its no longer present in the dashboards. We can see there only in the reports from February and before, but not longer in the current reports. We would like to know how to add it back ?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Memory Limits app is missing in the DVM tool in SAP f...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

 

The Memory Limit Tile is intended to provide an early forecast on when the system memory limits will be reached, so as to allow customers take appropriate action in advance to avoid unnecessary interruption to their business operations.

Qualified system/client:

The forecast has been activated for dataset collected from non-BW/4 system and from non-zero client. For each qualified system/client, we predict the data footprint at the end of each month, and up to the next 36 months into the future. Based on that, the time-2-die figure is generated and displayed in the DVM App.

 

When the tile will be displayed:

When the forecast result is ready and reasonable, the memory limit tile will be displayed.

In case of a high difference between predicted value (predicted data footprint from most recent month) and actual measured value, this tile will be hidden. The current threshold is 20%.  

Meaning when the difference is less than 20%, the tile will be shown.

entry.title: É possivel gerar uma nota complementar de ICMS para adsubcon
entry.content: A empresa envia o material  utilizando Adsubcon, se o produto Nao retorna como beneficiado depois de 120 dias devemos emitir uma nota complementar daquele componente, processo feito manualmente pela j1b1n. Queremos associar pela Adsubcon para ficar automatizado. Alguém conhece algo?

Looks promising with wide array of documents where this could be used. For Ariba POs, we can also consider the Intelligent Invoice Conversion solution.

AI in SAP Ariba Invoicing - Intelligent Invoice Conversion

entry.title: Re: SF-LMS: Information of the security domain an employe...
entry.content:
Hi @NVougiouklidi,

In Learning user data is historical and can be reported using the OOTB User Summary Data Audit report. This report includes the user security domain. If edited, the report will evidence that.

Hope that helps, Frederic

entry.title: How to share MDK app with colleagues?
entry.content:
Hi all,

I've developed a MDK application and I want my colleagues to test it but at the moment I'm not able to brand my app with MDK SDK.

I was wondering if share the app qr code with my team possible?!

I've shared the qr code with one of my team member and when he read the code into the mdk svcs app and logged in his sap btp cockpit account the login failed with this error message: The user must be pre-defined.

I've searched the mobile services where can I set up a user but I didn't find it.

Do anybody has any ideas how can solve my problem?

Thanks in advance! 🙂

entry.title: Re: ABAP
entry.content:
You should definitely take a look at the ABAP Documentation: Selection of Table Category - ABAP Keyword Documentation (sap.com)

As far as I know, A and D should be the correct answers.

entry.title: How to integrate rest API with Soft tab
entry.content:
Dear All, 

I need help to integrate "Soft tab" with rest API data!
In the database I have three parameters: City, Month and time.
City should be displayed in the first field (Dropdown).
Months should be displayed in the Soft tab.
The result of all should be a timetable for the selected city and month.
How can I fix this?
I can send my project to whoever wants to help me.

entry.title: Re: How to access a transaction execution history
entry.content: Hi Jason, SM20 worked in my case for which TCode has been executed by user on such date and time..

entry.title: Re: AI Assisted Skills Architecture Creation
entry.content:
Hi @Sharath1 

Great article which clarifies many important points. Thanks!

  1. We are using Recruiting. When can we expect to have the option to use the tool ? (You state pre-2H. Any more specific date yet?) At that point will it use a combination of Job Requisitions and Job Descriptions as input or just the Job requisitions?
  2. What is the suggestion for maintaining the skills and mappings after the first use of the upgrade? Is it possible to run the upgrade again after the first run to update skills and mappings?
  3. How many skills are typically created per role?

Thanks,

Ran

entry.title: Re: ABAP
entry.content:
Link to last version of Abap documentation: ABAP - Keyword Documentation (latest)

  • So Selection of Table Category

entry.title: Draft Report with Bin Locations - Goods Receipt PO
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to develop a query to display all open draft documents with the line details for goods receipt PO. this includes Bin locations however ive hit a wall as incorperating ODRF and DRF1 into OPDN, PDN1 has thrown my results fully. can any advise where im going wrong on the below:

SELECT
OPDN.DocNum,
pdn1.ItemCode,
OBTL.Quantity AS Quantity,
OBin.BinCode,
Ousr.U_NAME
FROM
opdn
INNER JOIN
pdn1 ON opdn.docentry = pdn1.docentry
INNER JOIN
OITM ON pdn1.ItemCode = OITM.ItemCode
INNER JOIN
oivl ON oivl.ItemCode = pdn1.ItemCode
AND oivl.TransType = 20
AND pdn1.LineNum = oivl.DocLineNum
LEFT JOIN
OBTL ON oivl.MessageID = obtl.MessageID
LEFT JOIN
OBIN ON obin.AbsEntry = obtl.BinAbs
LEFT JOIN
POR1 ON pdn1.BaseType = 22
AND PDN1.BaseEntry = POR1.DocEntry
AND PDN1.BaseLine = POR1.LineNum
LEFT JOIN
OPOR ON OPOR.DocEntry = POR1.DocEntry
LEFT JOIN
OUSR ON OPDN.UserSign = OUSR.USERID
WHERE
opdn.DocStatus = 'O' AND opdn.draftkey IS NOT NULL
